title: Jam-a-lot
description: A sports musical adventure about an NBA player finding himself in a cartoon Camelot. Originally a bomb at the box office, it’s found a cult following in the decades after.
quote: I like to shoot the basketball!
altHero: Black basketball player spins a basketball on his finger
alt1: basketball player rides a horse and wearing a knight’s helmet
alt3: a cartoon rabbit checks his watch
alt4: cartoon animals sing as the player spins the basketball
